definition: Subject is the direct legal or accounting parent of object for a stated period.
Subject is a direct subsidiary of object for a stated period.
Subject business segment belongs to object entity.
Subject brand is operated by or mapped to object legal entity.
Subject product or platform is operated by object entity.
Subject operates object facility.
Subject owns object facility or asset.
Subject reports beneficial ownership or control in object.
Institution reports a holding for a stated report period.
Subject controls specified voting rights in object.
Subject has documented board appointment or decision rights over object.
Subject has documented veto or special governance rights.
Subjects share documented control or ownership of a venture.
Subject supplies material goods or services to object.
Subject manufactures wafers or chips for object.
Subject packages or tests products for object.
Subject provides production or infrastructure equipment to object.
Subject provides critical materials or chemicals to object.
Subject provides electricity fuel or energy capacity to object.
Subject provides logistics or freight services to object.
Subject integrates systems or finished equipment for object.
Subject distributes products or services for object.
Subject is a documented customer of object.
Subject commits to buy or provide specified capacity.
Subject invested capital in object.
Subject provided debt or credit to object.
Subject received financing from object.
Subject underwrites securities or financing for object.
Subject guarantees an obligation of object.
Subject made a capital commitment; distinguish commitment from deployed cash.
Subject acquired object; announced signed approved and effective dates must be distinguished.
Subjects merged under a documented transaction.
Subject sold or divested object or an asset.
Subject separated object through a spin-off.
Person serves as director during an effective period.
Person serves as executive during an effective period.
Person is a documented founder; not equivalent to current control.
Entities share one or more directors during an overlapping period.
Subject provides cloud services or capacity to object.
Subject provides compute infrastructure or capacity to object.
Subjects have an official strategic partnership.
Subject licenses intellectual property to object.
Subject provides documented data access or data services to object.

Entity event or fact contradicts a theme hypothesis.
Entities compete in a defined theme and time window.
